name: oppenbokforing-desktop
description: Local-first open-source bookkeeping for Swedish enskild firma

scripts.test:m8: vitest run src/test/m8_simple_ux.test.ts && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --no-default-features --test m8_milestone
scripts.ci:public: npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:golden && npm run test:m8 && npm run test:all && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features desktop && npm run build && npm run bindings:check
scripts.setup: npm ci && npm run icons:dev && npm run bindings:export
scripts.bindings:check: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --no-default-features --bin export_bindings && git diff --exit-code -- src/lib/bindings.ts
